home.heroSubtitle: High-end custom work that drives results. Remote collaboration with studios worldwide.
home.testimonialQuote: Fastoosh delivered exceptional work in record time. Their attention to detail and understanding of our brand was remarkable.
home.capability1Description: Every frame matters. Pixel-perfect attention to detail that elevates your brand.
home.capability2Description: Structured process. Clear milestones. On-time delivery without compromising quality.
home.capability3Description: Motion design that drives results. Conversion-focused, data-informed creative.
home.processStep1Description: Deep dive into your goals, brand, and audience
home.processStep2Description: Creative direction, styleframes, and motion tests
home.ctaSubtitle: Let's discuss your project. We typically reply within 24-48 hours.

about.subtitle: We're a small team of motion designers obsessed with craft, speed, and clarity.
about.story1: Fastoosh started in 2019 as a side project. We were frustrated with slow turnarounds and unclear communication in the motion design industry.
about.story2Pre: So we built a studio focused on three things:
about.story3: Today, we work with ambitious startups and Fortune 500 companies worldwide. Every project gets the same attention to detail, whether it's a 15-second social ad or a full brand identity system.
about.story4: We're remote-first, NDA-friendly, and reply within 24-48 hours.
about.ctaSubtitle: We're always looking for exciting projects. If you're building something ambitious, let's talk.

values.title: Clarity
values.description: Clear communication, transparent process, no surprises.

values.title: Speed
values.description: Fast turnaround without compromising on quality.

values.title: Craft
values.description: Obsessive attention to detail in every frame.

values.title: Reliability
values.description: On-time delivery, always. Your deadlines are sacred.

projects.subtitle: Curated work for ambitious brands and fast-growing startups

workWithUs.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to start — a live call or a written brief. Either way, we'll build something great together.
workWithUs.bookCallDesc: 30-min video call. We discuss scope, goals, and strategy live.
workWithUs.sendBriefDesc: No calls needed. Fill in your project details and we'll reply with a proposal.
workWithUs.prescreenSubtitle: We'll show up prepared so the call is focused and valuable.
workWithUs.formSubtitle: We'll review and reply within 24–48 hours with a tailored proposal.
workWithUs.projectDescPlaceholder: Tell us about your project, goals, and any references you love...

trustSignals.title: Fast response
trustSignals.body: We reply within 24–48 h, every time

trustSignals.title: NDA-friendly
trustSignals.body: Happy to sign NDAs before discussing details

trustSignals.title: Remote worldwide
trustSignals.body: We work seamlessly across all timezones

callSteps.title: Quick pre-screen
callSteps.body: Tell us your name, email, and a bit about your project so we show up prepared.

callSteps.title: Pick a time slot
callSteps.body: Choose any 30-minute slot that works in your timezone — no back-and-forth emails.

callSteps.title: Discovery call
callSteps.body: We discuss scope, goals, and timeline live. You leave with full clarity.

callSteps.title: Tailored proposal
callSteps.body: Within 48 h of the call we send a detailed proposal with pricing and next steps.

briefSteps.title: Fill the brief
briefSteps.body: Share your project type, budget range, timeline, and description — takes 3 minutes.

briefSteps.title: We review it
briefSteps.body: Our team reads your brief and checks availability — reply within 24–48 h.

briefSteps.title: Discovery call
briefSteps.body: We follow up with a call invitation to go deeper on scope and strategy.

briefSteps.title: Tailored proposal
briefSteps.body: You receive a comprehensive proposal with timeline, deliverables, and pricing.
